Name: Impose battle XP reduction
Description: Impose a reduction to the player's Battle Pass XP.

Name: View as
Description: View the same post from the perspective of the creator

Name: Staff chat
Description: Give staff members the option to privately communicate with other staff members in a separate chat channel.

Name: Delayed invitation entry point
Description: Manage the flow of users joining the platform through a waiting list.

Name: Favourites in feed preference
Description: Add people and pages in favourites so the platform will prioritize their content in the user's feed.

Name: Delete content
Description: Remove or archive content so they are no longer visible on your profile or on the platform.

Name: Limit unwanted interactions
Description: Limit for a period of time any unwanted interactions from accounts that are either not followers or are recent followers of the user.

Name: Ignore bubble
Description: Configure the user's personal bubble where other players become fully invisible upon entering.

Name: User flairs
Description: Create a visual flag next to a community member's username.

Name: Limit supporter payments
Description: Block a person who made a previous payment from making future payments.

Name: Check IP address
Description: Establish whether two or more accounts are being operated by one individual or group of people.

Name: Block suspected spam content
Description: Block messages with spam-like content from being posted.

Name: Check ban
Description: Check if a target is banned

Name: Content location
Description: Shape the content the user sees based on the current or preferred location.

Name: Oversight
Description: Removes information from any form of usual access

Name: Freeze a player
Description: Freeze a player

Name: Read receipts
Description: Let others know when the user has seen their messages.

Name: Block custom words
Description: Block messages that contain custom-made words.

Name: Show liked content
Description: Let others see the user's liked content.

Name: Obscure filtered keywords
Description: Obscure filtered words using symbols like * or <3

Name: Display recently streamed categories
Description: Choose to show or hide categories the user has recently streamed.

Name: Shield mode
Description: Pre-set safety settings to quickly remove harassing messages and users from chat.

Name: Allow podcasting
Description: Allow the user's audio posts to be turned into a podcast their members can listen on other podcast apps.

Name: Share user status
Description: Decide whether to show the user's online status.

Name: Avoid contacts/people you know
Description: Avoid finding users that the user has in their contact list.

Name: Vote kick
Description: Vote to kick other users.

Name: Timeout
Description: Prohibit a user from interacting with the community during the timeout period.

Name: Kick all
Description: Kick all players off the server except the issuer.

Name: Honor lock
Description: Lock a user from progressing in the game by disqualifying the user for in-game rewards and locking the player's rank.

Name: Pin
Description: Pin to keep a specific content highlighted.

Name: Reach out for help while live streaming
Description: Send a notification to a streamer where they can interact in case help is needed when a user informs the platform about a streamer requiring support during a live stream.

Name: Vandalism checker
Description: Allows users to review edits by detecting potential vandalism real-time.

Name: Clip sharing on stories
Description: Decide who can share the user's featured clips in their stories.

Name: Remove last warning
Description: Delete the last warning issued to a player.

Name: History of a player
Description: Check a player's punishment history.

Name: Enable slash commands
Description: Allow users in the server to use slash commands.

Name: Represent company
Description: Allow the user's information to be presented with company pages and insights

Name: Inferred identity
Description: Personalize experience based on information obtained by inferred activities done by the user.

Name: Reply filters
Description: Show replies with the preferred minimum number of likes in the user's feed.

Name: Label AI-generated content
Description: Label content as AI-generated according to the community guidelines.

Name: Sort comments
Description: Sort comments by the selected category.

Name: AFK status
Description: Send a message with the user's status every time someone mentions them.

Name: Usage limit in text
Description: Warn users or delate messages which use excessive emoji

Name: Tribunal
Description: Provide users the ability to vote on whether a reported behaviour is toxic and crowdsources the result to make a moderation decision.

Name: Hide like/reaction count
Description: Hide the number of reactions under posts a user shares to their profile or posts shared by other users.

Name: Death to comments
Description: Makes comments from videos disappear.

Name: Disappearing messages timer
Description: Erase messages between users after a certain amount of time.

Name: Auto mute
Description: Auto-mute players who receive regular reports of verbal abuse during games.

Name: Shopping recommendations
Description: Shop for products similar to those shown in a user's pins using visual search.

Name: Hide content that contains keywords
Description: Filter content that contains keywords decided by the user.

Name: Queue delays
Description: Impose a time to delay to stop player from joining a new game right away.

Name: Staff rollback
Description: Roll back all StaffName actions (bans

Name: Account search privacy
Description: Hide the user's profile and content from search engines.

Name: Chat tickets
Description: Allow players to communicate with staff members privately through a ticket system.

Name: Restricted features until purchase
Description: Users cannot access all features of the platform if they do not make a purchase of a paid game.

Name: Exclude content from your interests profile
Description: Remove similar content from the user's feed.

Name: Arrange DMs
Description: Arrange DMs depending on categories

Name: Restrict user
Description: Restrict a user from interacting with the user's content.

Name: Hold messages until a mod reviews
Description: Hold risky messages for moderators to review automatically.

Name: Manage friend requests
Description: Decide who can send a friend request.

Name: Kick
Description: Remove a user from the server temporarily. Users can return to the server if they receive a new invite.

Name: Unlock pattern
Description: Use an unlock pattern for (VR) games requiring parental supervision.

Name: Personalised ads
Description: Receive ads based on their activity on the platform.

Name: Range ban
Description: Ban the IP range from ip1 to ip2 for the supplied reason.

Name: Disable the chat
Description: Disable the chat so that users cannot send messages.

Name: Share mod comments
Description: Share the channel's moderation comments with moderators in other channels.

Name: ModMail
Description: Allow users to contact the moderators of a server via direct messages.

Name: Enable requests for share of banned user information
Description: Accept requests from other users for banned user information sharing.

Name: Chat rule agreement
Description: Enter rules that first-time viewers must agree to before chatting.

Name: Page curation
Description: Allow reviewers to mark new pages as reviewed

Name: Safety rating
Description: View at a glance the overall safety rating of a channel's safety combinations.

Name: Invite tracker
Description: Track how many people members invite to the community and rank them on a leaderboard.

Name: Block hyperlinks
Description: Delete URLs posted in the channel's chat except the ones posted by moderators

Name: Posting confirmation
Description: Inform users they are posting content on their profile that may be reported or removed.

Name: Ban
Description: Remove a user from the server permanently.

Name: Friend Requests
Description: Connect with another user by making a friend request.

Name: Clear chat history
Description: Clear chat history for non-moderators.

Name: Mark own content as sensitive
Description: Mark pictures and videos the user posts as sensitive for people who do not want to see sensitive content.

Name: Who can add to groups
Description: Decide from whom the user can be added to groups.

Name: Hide a playlist from profile
Description: Hide a playlist from the user's public profile.

Name: Unique chat
Description: Prevent users from sending duplicate messages in a channel.

Name: Share listening activity to other platforms
Description: Share listening activity on the platform to be publicly displayed on other platforms.

Name: Chat verification
Description: Allow only users with verified emails

Name: Moderate other bots
Description: Allow bots to moderate other bots.

Name: Emote-only chat
Description: Restrict chat to emote-only messages.

Name: Meta moderation
Description: Allow users to rate the moderation of randomly selected comment posts that was already rated by a moderator to evaluate moderation.

Name: Comments on public posts
Description: Choose who is allowed to comment on user's public posts.

Name: Suppress AI content
Description: Block any content that has been tagged as generated by AI or been detected to be made with AI tools.

Name: Manage the autoplay of videos
Description: Manage the autoplay of videos on the user feed.

Name: Audience control
Description: Label if the content is designed for users above a certain age.

Name: Make new playlists public
Description: Make every new playlist automatically public.

Name: Warnings
Description: Communicate directly to a user that their behavior is against the rules.

Name: Jail
Description: Put a player into Jail for a punishment.

Name: Filter dating pool
Description: Add a filter to shape the kind of partner the user wants to find.

Name: Sensitive content filter
Description: Filter content from accounts a user does not follow to avoid sensitive content.

Name: Most relevant comment first
Description: See the most relevant comments for the user's posts first.

Name: Review posts
Description: Review posts the user is tagged in before they appear on the user's profile.

Name: Allow promoted answers
Description: Allow advertisers on the platform to promote the user's answers.

Name: Non-mod chat delay
Description: Add a short delay before non-mods see messages. Any message that is timed out or banned during the delay is removed from chat completely.

Name: Hide badge
Description: Hide any badges like subscription status (tier or duration)

Name: HeartMob
Description: Request emotional or instrumental support such as positive messages or help with reporting.

Name: Copyrighted audio warning
Description: Notify the user if multiple instances of copyrighted audio are detected in their VODs within 24 hours.

Name: Private profile
Description: Let only approved users see the user's profile

Name: Hide live streams
Description: Hide all live broadcasts on the Store's product pages.

Name: Automatic review of reported posts
Description: Turn off automatic review from the platform moderation team.

Name: Horizon home
Description: Configure a virtual space only available to a user's added friends that will not be accessible to non-friends.

Name: Merging threads
Description: Combine a number of discussions with the same topic into one thread.

Name: Share ban information
Description: Share a list of banned users with moderators of other channels so as to easily trace and ban notoriously problematic users.

Name: Saved replies
Description: Use saved replies to set keyboard shortcuts for common responses.

Name: Clear history of a player
Description: Clear a player's punishment history.

Name: Show follower and following lists on profile
Description: Show the user's follower and following lists on their public profile.

Name: Block events invite
Description: Avoid invites from a user's profile.

Name: Turn comments on or off
Description: Turn commenting on or off for a post.

Name: Sensitive content alert
Description: Obscure content that can be triggering for users temporarily. Users can see the content after clicking a button.

Name: Make playlist private
Description: Make a playlist private so that other users cannot search for it.

Name: Block commonly flagged words
Description: Flag text that contains commonly flagged words like profanity

Name: Allow LLMs to be trained on your content
Description: Enable to have the user's content to be used as training data for LLMs.

Name: Mute single player
Description: Mute individual players.

Name: Teleport to a player
Description: Teleport a moderator to player in case of suspected bad actions.

Name: Silence unknown callers
Description: Silence calls from unknown numbers.

Name: Permitted words
Description: Allow messages containing these terms or phrases in chat. Terms are also automatically added when a mod approves a caught message.

Name: Garble voices
Description: Turn voice chat from any nearby non-friends into 'unintelligible

Name: Unrange ban
Description: Remove any RangeBan that overlaps with the given IP.

Name: Post requirements
Description: Minimize post removals by establishing requirements for posting.

Name: Hide media in DMs from unknown users
Description: Blur the image when an unknown user sends a message in DMs till accepted by the user.

Name: Show saved content
Description: Let others see the user's saved content.

Name: Follow or unfollow
Description: Follow or unfollow a user.

Name: Report offensive emblems
Description: Report triggering emblem's drawing made by users.

Name: Avoid as teammate
Description: Allow players to choose to avoid another player as a teammate in a game.

Name: Personal space
Description: Configure a two-foot radius of invisible virtual personal space that prevents people from getting close to the user.

Name: Explicit content control
Description: Allow play of explicit-rated content.

Name: Reminders
Description: Send custom messages on repeat every few minutes/hours.

Name: Profile viewing information
Description: Select what information about the user others see when the user has viewed their profile.

Name: Apply priority-listing to suggested channels
Description: Choose the order to display the suggested channels.

Name: Marking a thread as answered
Description: Sticky the selected post to the top of the thread with a blue highlight indicating that the user has marked that post as an answer to the original poster's topic.

Name: Don't recommend channel
Description: Choose to not be recommended a channel.

Name: Block mention spam
Description: Limit the number of unique mentions per message.

Name: Edit another user's post
Description: Make edits to another user's post to remove personal information or fix links.

Name: Enable raid
Description: Enable receiving a raid when one streamer directs their viewers to join another creator's live stream.

Name: Block gift subscriptions
Description: Block incoming gift subscriptions to channels the user does not follow.

Name: Staff alerts
Description: Send staff members notifications when specific actions occur such as name changing

Name: Content language
Description: Select the languages the user wants to see content in.

Name: Automated DM
Description: Send automatic replies to messages received in DM.

Name: Snooze a page or user
Description: Stop seeing posts from a page or user on the feed for 30 days.

Name: ToxMod
Description: Evaluate voice chat in real-time to report bad behavior.

Name: DupeIP mass report
Description: Report all users at the same dupeIP

Name: Unban requests
Description: Send one message appealing a ban after a specified cooldown period.

Name: Interests keywords
Description: Manage keywords generated from the user's history to personalize their feed.

Name: Hide comments
Description: Hide comments that can be spam

Name: Show no reposts
Description: Hide all reposts from the user's feed.

Name: Specific domain links only
Description: Allow links from specific domains only.

Name: Ban evasion
Description: Use machine learning to detect and act on potential ban evaders.

Name: Retrieve deleted posts
Description: Retrieve deleted posts within 30 days.

Name: Close friends / lists
Description: Post content for a specific group of people decided by the user.

Name: Matchmakers
Description: Assign friends as matchmakers to recommend the user potential matches

Name: Moderation history-based auto-mod
Description: Detect unwanted messages based on mod actions taken in the channel.

Name: Block user
Description: Block a user from interacting with you or accessing your content.

Name: Show recently played artists on profile
Description: Show recently played artists on the user's public profile page.

Name: Hide related content based on user history
Description: Hide content related to the content the user recently saved or tapped to view.

Name: Who can follow
Description: Choose who can follow the user's posts or content to allow people who are not their friends to see their public content.

Name: Personalize voice audio
Description: Mute all player voice audio or only turn on voice audio for favourite friends

Name: Set max time of usage
Description: Set up daily or weekly time limitation for app usage.

Name: Platform preferences
Description: Show the user only the games that support selected operating systems.

Name: TrollBusters
Description: Support female journalists with personal endorsements

Name: Notify when a screenshot is taken
Description: Send a notification every time another user takes a screenshot of the user's content.

Name: Edit inventory of a player
Description: See and/or edit the inventory of other players.

Name: Social interactions with ads
Description: Decide whether friends can see the user's social interactions (likes

Name: Block pages
Description: Block the page from interacting with the user's content.

Name: Remove as incompatible
Description: Remove unrelated content from the hub/game

Name: Collapse posts
Description: Collapse comments from untrusted members of the community.

Name: Display suggested channels
Description: Feature channels as suggested channels in the user's channel carousel when the user is offline.

Name: Block teleport
Description: Block a user from performing any form of teleportation.

Name: Slowmode chat
Description: Decrease the number of possible messages in the chat.

Name: Hidden requests
Description: Send messages from an unknown user that may contain unwanted material to a specific hidden area

Name: List of recent players
Description: View the list of players that a user has encountered while being logged in a session.

Name: Endorsements
Description: Hand out rewards at the end of a match to show a player's appreciation for how a user played.

Name: Hide page in some country
Description: Decide the countries where a page can be hidden.

Name: Remove content when searching
Description: Remove content from blocked or muted users when searching in the search bar.

Name: Report
Description: Notify the platform moderator about a user or content that violates the community guidelines

Name: Video preview
Description: Play video previews when the user hovers over thumbnails.

Name: Provide community coupons
Description: Give out rewards for users participating in activities in the community.

Name: Message nudges
Description: Receive reminders about messages the user has not responded to.

Name: Block DM
Description: Block a user from receiving or sending any private messages.

Name: Reviews on a user
Description: Review users with stars and comments after interacting with them.

Name: Teleport a player
Description: Teleport a player to the moderator.

Name: Private session
Description: Hide the user's activity temporarily from their followers and from affecting personalized content.
